title: cyclophorus splendens
intro: Cyclophorus splendens, also known as the "golden snail's eyes" or "cyclophorus," is a type of medicinal plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anthelmintic properties, which means it has the ability to expel intestinal worms and other parasites from the body. The health benefits of Cyclophorus splendens include its ability to treat parasitic infections, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Cyclophorus splendens is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the dried plant parts are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
